description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Book the cheapest in-office teeth whitening under $400 with a 60–90 minute duration on a Thursday at 3:00 PM
tasks.description: Find in-office teeth whitening treatments, filter to options under $400 with a listed duration between 60 and 90 minutes, choose the cheapest qualifying option, and submit an appointment request for the next available Thursday at 3:00 PM as a new patient.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Treatments" and then select "Teeth Whitening" from the dropdown list.
On the teeth whitening treatments page, locate the filter section and set the treatment type filter to "In-office" (not at-home kits).
In the price filter, enter "400" as the maximum price and apply the filter.
In the duration filter, select or enter a duration range of "60–90 minutes" and apply the filter.
Use the sort dropdown above the treatments list and choose "Price: Low to High" to sort the remaining treatments.
Click on the first treatment card in the sorted list (the cheapest in-office whitening that meets the price and duration criteria) to open its details page.
On the treatment details page, click the "Book Appointment" or "Request Appointment" button.
In the booking form, select "New patient" as the patient type, choose the next available Thursday on the calendar, and select the 3:00 PM time slot.

Fill in the required contact fields with sample data (e.g., name, phone, and email), type "Looking for in-office whitening under $400" in any comments field, and click the button to submit the appointment request.

tasks.name: Choose the more affordable veneer option for 4 teeth under $3,000 and find a financing term with monthly payments under $150
tasks.description: Compare porcelain and composite veneer options for treating 4 teeth, select the option where the total cost for 4 teeth is under $3,000 and lower than the alternative, then use the financing calculator to find a payment term that keeps the monthly payment below $150 for the selected total cost.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Treatments" menu and select "Veneers" from the list.
On the veneers overview page, click the tab or link labeled "Porcelain Veneers" to open the porcelain veneer details.
On the porcelain veneers page, locate the listed price per tooth and, if available, use any quantity selector or cost estimator to calculate the total cost for "4" teeth.
Use the navigation tabs or back link to return to the veneers overview and then click on the tab or link labeled "Composite Veneers" or "Composite Bonding" to open those details.
On the composite veneers page, locate the price per tooth and use any cost estimator or quantity selector to calculate the total cost for "4" teeth.

Based on the displayed total costs for 4 teeth, identify which veneer type (porcelain or composite) has a total cost under $3,000 and is cheaper than the other, and then click the button labeled "Get Financing" or "View Payment Options" on that chosen treatment page.
On the financing or payment options page, enter the chosen treatment total cost (for 4 teeth) into the financing calculator's "Treatment Cost" field.

Check the option or checkbox for "0% interest" or "No interest" if available, then adjust the term or duration slider (or term dropdown) until the displayed estimated monthly payment is less than "150" dollars.

After identifying a term with a monthly payment under $150, click the "Save Plan", "Email Me This Plan", or similar button, and fill in the name and email fields with sample data before submitting the form to record the selected financing option.

tasks.name: Find the nearest clinic open on Sundays within 15 miles of ZIP 94103 and submit an emergency contact form
tasks.description: Locate the clinic location nearest to ZIP code 94103 that is open on Sundays within a 15-mile radius, find its emergency contact details, and submit an emergency contact form for a broken tooth requesting help within 2 hours.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Locations" or "Find a Clinic" menu item in the main navigation.
On the locations page, find the search or ZIP code field and enter "94103" into the ZIP/postal code input.
In the distance filter, select a maximum radius of "15 miles" and apply the filter.
In the hours or availability filter section, select the option for "Open Sundays" and apply the filter to update the list of clinics.
From the filtered results list, click on the first clinic shown (the closest clinic that is open on Sundays within 15 miles) to open its location details page.
On the selected clinic's page, locate and click the section or button labeled "Emergency Care", "Emergency Dentistry", or similar.
Within the emergency section, click the "Emergency Contact Form", "Request Emergency Call", or similar button to open the emergency form.

In the emergency form, fill in the required fields with sample data: enter a name, a phone number, select "Broken tooth" or "Dental trauma" from any problem dropdown, and choose the preferred contact timeframe option labeled "Within 2 hours" or closest equivalent.
Type a short description such as "Broke a front tooth today, need urgent care" in the description or notes field and click the submit button to send the emergency contact request.

tasks.name: Select a female cosmetic dentist with 8+ years experience and rating 4.7+ and request a 10:00 AM consultation
tasks.description: Use the dentist directory to filter for a female cosmetic dentist with at least 8 years of experience and an average patient rating of 4.7 or higher, then submit a request for an in-person consultation at 10:00 AM on the earliest available date within the next 14 days.
steps: Navigate to the homepage and click on the "Our Dentists" or "Meet the Team" link in the main navigation.
On the dentists directory page, open the specialty filter and select "Cosmetic Dentistry" as the specialty.
Use the gender filter to select "Female" and apply the filter.
In the experience filter, choose the option "8+ years" or set the minimum years of experience field to "8" and apply the filter.
In the rating filter, set the minimum rating to "4.7" out of 5 and apply the filter to update the list.
Use the sort dropdown to sort the filtered dentists by "Highest rating" or "Top rated" and then click on the first dentist in the resulting list to open her profile.
On the dentist's profile page, click the "Book with Dr. [Name]", "Request Consultation", or similar button.
In the booking interface, select "In-person consultation" as the visit type and open the date picker to choose the earliest available date that falls within the next "14" days.
On that date, select the "10:00 AM" time slot, enter sample contact details in the required fields, and click the button to submit the consultation request with this specific dentist.

tasks.name: Use the smile assessment to select a treatment under $2,500 and under 6 months and request an emailed estimate
tasks.description: Complete the online smile assessment, filter recommended treatments to those with an estimated cost under $2,500 and a treatment duration of less than 6 months, select the treatment with the highest patient satisfaction rating among those, then request that an estimate be emailed by submitting a form with a test email address.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Smile Assessment" or "Find My Treatment" link in the main navigation or hero banner.

On the first assessment screen, answer the questions by selecting cosmetic concerns such as "Crooked teeth" and "Stained teeth" as applicable, then click "Next" or "Continue" until you reach the recommended treatments page.
On the recommended treatments page, locate the filters and set the maximum estimated cost to "2500" in the price filter, then apply the filter.
In the treatment duration filter, select options for treatments lasting less than "6 months" (e.g., choose "Up to 6 months" or uncheck any longer durations) and apply the filter.

From the filtered list of treatments, use any sort dropdown or visible rating indicators to identify and click on the treatment with the highest patient satisfaction or star rating among the displayed options.
On the selected treatment's detail page, click the button labeled "Get Estimate", "Estimate My Cost", or similar to open the estimate request form.

If a slider or dropdown for treatment scope appears, choose the option that best matches a moderate case (for example, select "Mild to moderate" or "Upper and lower front teeth"), then proceed to the next step of the form.
Enter a sample name and an email address such as "test@example.com" into the required fields, and optionally type "Please email me an estimate for this treatment" in any comments or notes field.
Click the submit or "Send Estimate" button to request that the treatment estimate be emailed to the provided address.

tasks.name: Claim a new-patient exam, X-ray, and cleaning offer under $199 in March 2026 on a Tuesday at 9:00 AM
tasks.description: Find a special offer for new patients that includes an exam, X-rays, and cleaning for under $199, confirm it is valid during March 2026, and use it to request an appointment on a Tuesday in March 2026 at 9:00 AM at any clinic location.
steps: On the homepage, click on the "Special Offers" or "Promotions" link in the main navigation.
On the offers page, use the offer type filter to select "New Patient" or check the box for "New patient specials" and apply the filter.
In the price or discount filter, set the maximum price to "199" dollars and apply the filter so only offers under that price are shown.
From the filtered list, click on an offer whose title or description explicitly mentions "Exam", "X-rays", and "Cleaning" together to open its detailed offer page.

On the offer details page, locate the validity dates information and ensure that the offer includes dates covering March 2026 by checking any date range or "Valid through" field that extends at least up to "March 31, 2026".
Click the "Claim Offer", "Book with This Offer", or similar button on the offer page to open the appointment booking form associated with the promotion.
In the booking form, select a clinic location from the location dropdown, then open the calendar and choose a date that falls on a Tuesday in "March 2026".
For the selected Tuesday, pick the "9:00 AM" time slot, and enter any required personal details such as name, phone, and email in the appropriate fields.

If there is a promo code field prefilled or shown on the offer, ensure it is selected or leave it as displayed, then click the submit button to finalize claiming the offer and requesting the appointment.

tasks.name: Find a 0% interest Invisalign payment plan for a $4,800 treatment with monthly payments at or below $200
tasks.description: Use the website's financing calculator for Invisalign to enter a total treatment cost of $4,800, filter for plans with 0% interest, and adjust the term until the displayed estimated monthly payment is less than or equal to $200, then submit an application request for that plan.
steps: Navigate to the homepage and click on the "Financing" or "Payment Plans" link in the main navigation.
On the financing page, locate the treatment dropdown and select "Invisalign" or the closest clear aligner option.
In the treatment cost field of the financing calculator, type "4800" as the total cost.
Check the box or toggle labeled "0% interest", "No interest", or similar to restrict the results to interest-free plans.
Use the term slider or term length dropdown to adjust the number of months until the calculator shows an estimated monthly payment amount that is less than or equal to "200" dollars.
Once the monthly payment is at or below $200, click the button labeled "Apply Now", "Request This Plan", or similar associated with the calculated plan.
In the application form that appears, enter a sample full name, a phone number, and an email address in the respective fields.

Fill out any requested financial fields, such as selecting "Full-time" from an employment status dropdown and entering "4000" as the monthly income, and type "200" into any field asking for "Desired monthly payment".
Click the submit button on the application or request form to send the financing request for the selected 0% interest Invisalign plan.

tasks.name: Save two composite bonding front-teeth cases completed in 1–2 visits and request a similar result for the second case
tasks.description: Use the smile gallery to filter cases to composite bonding on front teeth completed in 1–2 visits, add the first two qualifying cases to a favorites list, then open the favorites page and submit a request for a similar result based on the second saved case.
steps: From the homepage, click on the "Smile Gallery" or "Before & After" link in the main navigation.
On the gallery page, open the treatment type filter and select "Composite Bonding" as the treatment.
Use the area or tooth location filter to select "Front teeth" or the closest equivalent option and apply the filter.
In the visits or number-of-appointments filter, choose "1–2 visits" or select the options corresponding to 1 and 2 visits, then apply the filter to update the gallery.
From the filtered gallery results, scroll if needed and click on the first case thumbnail to open its detailed view.
On the case detail page, click the "Add to Favorites", "Save Case", or similar button to add this first case to your favorites list, then use the navigation control to return to the gallery list.
Back in the gallery, click on the second case thumbnail to open its detailed view and again click the "Add to Favorites" or "Save Case" button to save this second case.
Next, click on the "Favorites", "Saved Cases", or "My Gallery" link or icon, often located in the header or gallery page, to open the list of saved cases.

On the favorites page, locate the second saved case and click the "Request Similar Result", "I Want This Smile", or similar button associated with that case, then fill in the request form with a sample name, phone, and message such as "I would like a similar composite bonding result on my front teeth" before clicking the submit button.
